data: {"generalSituation":"A fresh to strong easterly airstream will bring slightly cooler weather to the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. There will still be a few showers at first tomorrow. With the easterly airstream moderating gradually, the weather will improve over the coast of southern China early to midweek next week. Meanwhile, under the influence of an anticyclone aloft, it will be hot during the day over the region. A southwesterly airstream will bring unsettled weather to the coastal areas in the latter part of next week. There will be occasional showers and squally thunderstorms. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Hagupit now in the vicinity of Guam is expected to move in the general direction of the seas east of the Philippines in the next few days.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260509","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"East force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore and on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.
